title: havetia flexilis
intro: Havetia flexilis, also known as havetia or havetia tree, is a plant species native to tropical regions of Central and South America. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of havetia flexilis include reducing inflammation, relieving pain, and promoting wound healing. The plant is typically prepared as a tea, infusion, or decoction, and its leaves and bark are used in herbal medicine.
